name: sheetforge-server
description: SheetForge — Scanned image → DXF + G-Code pipeline via OpenCV pre-processing and Claude Vision AI

pipeline: 1. multer          — multipart file upload (PNG, JPEG, PDF, TIFF, BMP, SVG, DWG, DXF)
2. sharp           — image pre-processing: grayscale, threshold, normalise, sharpen (libvips-based CV)
3. pdf2pic         — rasterise PDF pages to PNG at 300 DPI before CV
4. jimp            — pure-JS image manipulation: resize, rotate, filters, edge detection
5. image-js        — advanced image processing: sobel edges, gaussian blur, morphology
6. canvas          — Node.js Canvas API for drawing geometry previews
7. @anthropic-ai/sdk — Claude Vision (claude-opus-4-5) for semantic geometry extraction → JSON
8. @tarikjabiri/dxf — full AutoCAD DXF R12/R2000 writer with layers, LINE, CIRCLE, ARC, TEXT, HATCH
9. dxf-parser      — parse incoming .DXF files for round-trip editing
10. potrace        — bitmap → SVG vector tracing (open-source; used as CV fallback)
11. opentype.js    — embed fonts into DXF title blocks
12. archiver       — ZIP all generated files (DXF + 8× .nc) for one-click download
G-Code target machines (all generated by generateGCode()):
laser    — CO₂ / Fiber laser cutter (Trotec, BossLaser, Thunder Laser)
plasma   — Plasma cutter (Hypertherm, Thermal Dynamics)
waterjet — Waterjet (OMAX, KMT, Flow)
mill     — CNC milling (Fanuc, HAAS, Okuma, Siemens 840D)
router   — CNC router (ShopBot, Multicam, Biesse)
lathe    — CNC turning (Fanuc, Mazak, Doosan)
edm      — Wire EDM (Mitsubishi, Sodick, Charmilles)
oxyfuel  — Flame/oxyfuel cutting (Lincoln Electric, Victor)
